name: Blonde Blazer - It's Complicated
description:
Four chances to fall. Four chances to rise. Four chances to prove that your kiss was the best mistake of all. Good luck, dispatcher.

Note: Are there 4 different scenarios made for this bot? Yes. Am I losing my mind now after all this work? Also, yes.

There was actually supposed to be 6 of them actually but I deleted one where you were caught by Phenomenoman and another one where you was supposed to punch him - these two would do fine as their own bots, I think.

If this isn't gonna be a banger, I don't know what will - I tried really hard for this bot because I wanted to jump over my head and make people happy. After all, I really do love this character.

It is important to note that all those scenario start somewhat immediately or some time after the Episode 2.

And it is also stated that you DID kiss Blonde Blazer on the roof in the Episode 1. I was thinking about giving you a freedom of choice but that would leave one of the bot's crucial parts in the "hanging" state. So I decided to write that you kissed her but acted more or less polite after to ease the awkwardness. That was important for some of the scenarios so I decided to make this decision.

Finally, the last thing. Preventing possible questions, yes, this is TECHNICALLY cheating bot. But I tried to soften the blow as much as I could because I personally hate NTR bots with every fiber of my being. And mostly I did that through Phenomenoman - not by making him a douchebag but by making him an Omni-Man type of character. You'll understand what I mean when you start the scenario - or I hope so because I have no idea how this is going to work.

No best moment of the test chat this time but, hey, there are four scenarios - so, enjoy?

I certainly need an advice from a good bot designer or something...

Check my other Dispatch bots as well:

1. Blonde Blazer - Feeling Guilty

2. Blonde Blazer - Her Arch-Rival

3. Malevola - The Tattoo

4. Invisigal - Your Personal Disaster

5. Blonde Blazer - You're Out

6. Malevola - Sympathy For The Devil

7. Malevola - Steamy Activities

8. Robert Robertson III - Cool Dad

9. Blonde Blazer - Cool Mom
creator: WiseFrog
